nasb.text: Then these men said, “We will not find any ground of accusation against this Daniel unless we find it against him with regard to the law of his God.”

esv.text: Then these men said, “We shall not find any ground for complaint against this Daniel unless we find it in connection with the law of his God.”

cnv.text: 那些人就說：“如果我們要控告這但以理，就只有在他　神的律法中去找把柄。”

ccb.text: 最后他们说：“除非我们从但以理上帝的律法下手，否则找不到指控他的把柄。”
